de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint

Class AbstractHitCountBreakpoint

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractBreakpoint
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IBreakpoint
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractConditionalBreakpoint, ExceptionBreakpoint, FieldWatchpoint, SymbolicExecutionExceptionBreakpoint

    public abstract class AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
extends AbstractBreakpoint
    Adds the hit count functionality to an AbstractBreakpoint.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private int hitCount
      The HitCount of the Breakpoint (set by user).
      private int hitted
      Counter for how often the Breakpoint was hit.
      private Map<Integer,Boolean> hittedNodes
      Map to save the nodes that already have been reached, so nodes are not counted twice for the hitcount

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractHitCountBreakpoint(int hitCount, Proof proof, boolean enabled)
      Creates a new AbstractHitCountBreakpoint.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getHitCount()
      Returns the hitCount of the associated Breakpoint.
      protected boolean hitcountExceeded(Node node)
      Checks if the Hitcount is exceeded for the given JavaLineBreakpoint.
      boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement, RuleApp ruleApp, Proof proof, Node node)
      Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered.
      void setHitCount(int hitCount)
      Set the hitCount to the new value

    • Field Detail

      • hitCount

        private int hitCount
        The HitCount of the Breakpoint (set by user).

      • hitted

        private int hitted
        Counter for how often the Breakpoint was hit.

      • hittedNodes

        private final Map<Integer,Boolean> hittedNodes
        Map to save the nodes that already have been reached, so nodes are not counted twice for the hitcount

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractHitCountBreakpoint

        public AbstractHitCountBreakpoint(int hitCount,
                          Proof proof,
                          boolean enabled)
        Creates a new AbstractHitCountBreakpoint.
        Parameters:
        hitCount - the number of hits after which the execution should hold at this breakpoint
        proof - the Proof that will be executed and should stop
        enabled - flag if the Breakpoint is enabled

    • Method Detail

      • hitcountExceeded

        protected boolean hitcountExceeded(Node node)
        Checks if the Hitcount is exceeded for the given JavaLineBreakpoint. If the Hitcount is not exceeded the hitted counter is incremented, otherwise its set to 0.
        Returns:
        true if the Hitcount is exceeded or the JavaLineBreakpoint has no Hitcount.

      • isBreakpointHit

        public boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement,
                      RuleApp ruleApp,
                      Proof proof,
                      Node node)
        Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered. Override this method in order to suspend execution when a breakpoint is hit.
        Parameters:
        activeStatement - the activeStatement of the node
        ruleApp - the applied RuleApp
        proof - the current proof
        node - the current node
        Returns:
        true if execution should hold

      • getHitCount

        public int getHitCount()
        Returns the hitCount of the associated Breakpoint.
        Returns:
        the hitCount of the associated Breakpoint

      • setHitCount

        public void setHitCount(int hitCount)
        Set the hitCount to the new value
        Parameters:
        hitCount - the new value
